calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, of Pacific Justice Center, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiffs;
Howard A. Slavitt, of Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass LLP, Tel. 415.391.4800, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court grants PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment. The Court finds the Consent Judgment ensures compliance with the warning requirements, reimbursement of attorneys' fees is reasonable and civil penalty is reasonable. Order and stipulated consent judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Joinder In Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment And Stipulated Request To Add A Sentence To Form Of [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, of Pacific Justice Center, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiffs;
Howard A. Slavitt, of Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass LLP, Tel. 415.391.4800, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court grants DEFENDANT NAVITAS LLC's Joinder In Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment And Stipulated Request To Add A Sentence To Form Of [Proposed] Order. The Court finds the Consent Judgment ensures compliance with the warning requirements, reimbursement of attorneys' fees is reasonable and civil penalty is reasonable. Order and stipulated consent judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
